code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = string.len(trimmed)
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 0
  mut sign_a = 1
  mut sign_b = 1
  mut i = 0
  mut in_first = true
  mut started = false
  mut sign_set = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        if started
          in_first = false
          started = false
          sign_set = false
        end
      else if c == 45 and not sign_set and not started
        if in_first
          sign_a = -1
        else
          sign_b = -1
        end
        sign_set = true
      else if c == 43 and not sign_set and not started
        sign_set = true
      else
        started = true
        sign_set = true
        let d = c - 48
        if in_first
          a = a * 10 + d
        else
          b = b * 10 + d
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  a = a * sign_a
  b = b * sign_b
  let r = a * a + b * b
  println("r=#{r}")
end
